extra.reason: Autofix selfreview complete. Fixed: x-cli group collision (workspace-admin), OpenAPI tag collision (workspace_admin), CONTEXT_ROUTERS drift (mounted separately), redundant CSS wrapper. Filed cd-1h7k (scope ambiguity, blocks cd-ovt4) and cd-wzk0 (docs follow-up).
AsyncIOScheduler bootstrap + register_jobs + heartbeat wired; /readyz flips green end-to-end; 39 scoped tests + 291 broader pass; follow-ups: cd-dcl2 (generator fan-out), cd-8euz (failure alerting).

Autofix selfreview complete. Fixed: wrap_job now awaits async bodies (+ 2 regression tests), tightened idempotency assertion. Filed: cd-76qx (UPSERT race for horizontal worker scale-out), cd-udts (log redaction over-masking event field). All quality gates green.
POST /api/v1/auth/logout implemented: best-effort 204 + clearing Set-Cookie, invalidates session server-side, audit logged. 8 integration tests pass.

Autofix selfreview clean — no BUGS/MISSING/RISKY. All coder-flagged concerns verified against spec (per-user invalidation spec-correct; validate() ordering benign; secure=True mirrors login; CSRF skip correct; docs edits accurate). 70 tests + ruff/mypy green.

Wrapped magic_link.request_link, signup (via magic_link), and membership.invite mailer sends in try/except MailDeliveryError + WARNING log. Audit rows commit before send. 3 new enumeration-guard unit tests mirror recovery pattern. 124 scoped tests pass.

Autofix selfreview clean — no BUGS/MISSING/RISKY. Three guarded sites confirmed as the complete set (recovery-two already guarded, magic/signup/invite the new three). Transactional boundary verified: nonce row flushed before send, audit row written after send (both in-session so they commit with caller's UoW). MailDeliveryError catch scope narrow (Mailer protocol contract wraps all SMTP transport failures). Log shape (stdlib _log.warning + exc_info=True) matches app/util/logging.py JSON formatter + redaction. Recovery precedent fidelity: exact same try/except shape. Invite invariant preserved: email validated upstream before any DB write. Router surface: magic.request 202, signup.start 202, users.invite 201 all preserved on outage. Timing parity for direct /auth/magic/request?purpose=recover_passkey is a pre-existing asymmetry (not introduced here). Filed cd-kw54 (unrelated test_mail_smtp.py format drift). Per instructions, did not commit/push.

Three token kinds (scoped/delegated/personal) landed: migration f7c9e1a4b5d8 adds kind + delegate_for_user_id + subject_user_id + nullable workspace_id + 2 CHECK constraints. mint/verify/revoke branch per-kind. New /api/v1/me/tokens surface for PAT. Scoped: workspace cap 5; PAT: per-subject cap 5. 446 auth tests pass. Follow-ups: cd-t2su (PAT audit seam), cd-xawm (UI), cd-et6y (delegator liveness in verify()).

Autofix selfreview complete. Fixed migration downgrade data-loss bug (DELETE PAT rows before narrowing workspace_id NOT NULL). Added DB-level CHECK constraint tests (7 XOR branches) + 401 coverage for /me/tokens GET/DELETE. Raised cd-t2su (PAT audit), cd-et6y (delegator liveness) to P1 blockers. Filed cd-nld2, cd-a2o3, cd-qj5u. All quality gates green.

Workspace kill-switch wired via spec-canonical workspaces.settings_json column (§02). Migration a1b2c3d4e5f6 adds settings_json. is_self_service_recovery_disabled() walks non-archived grants most-restrictive-wins. Fresh-UoW audit row recovery.disabled_by_workspace. 103 scoped tests pass (SQLite+Postgres). Reconciled §03 step 5 spec drift (any vs every). Follow-up: cd-x1xh (role_grant soft-retire columns).

Autofix selfreview: fixed cd-65kn → cd-x1xh pointer in 4 places, reconciled §03:838 'every' → 'any'. Filed cd-kskl (P3, timing side-channel). Noted §03 step 2 drift for audit-spec pass (pre-existing). 103 scoped tests green on SQLite + Postgres; ruff/mypy/lint-imports clean.

Autofix selfreview: fixed BUG (sweep ignored injected clock → non-deterministic cutoff), switched tuple-ordered job-set assertions to set equality, added pg_only tzinfo-preservation assertion. 63 tests green; ruff/mypy clean.

Shipped: property service with CRUD + multi-belonging bootstrap + address/country back-fill + audit on every mutation; tenancy-scoped; unit + integration green on SQLite (Postgres via CREWDAY_TEST_DB).
Shipped with cd-8u5: IANA timezone validation added in DTO, 3 new tests cover timezone + update-path country mismatch; quality gates green.

Shipped: crewday CLI scaffolding — Click root group with --profile/--workspace/--output/--version, frozen CrewdayContext, ExitCode + CrewdayError hierarchy, handle_errors decorator, PEP 561 py.typed, hatchling build target. Downstream tasks (HTTP client, codegen, formatters, config) plug into this root.

Shipped with cd-j202: suppressed PII-leaking tracebacks to DEBUG (--verbose opt-in), added __main__.py so python -m crewday works, added import-linter contract guarding cli/crewday from app internals, +4 tests.

Shipped: messaging + notifications + digest_record + chat_channel + chat_message ORM + alembic migration c3d4e5f6a7b8. All five entities workspace-scoped via tenancy registry; portable CHECK constraints on kind/source; FK CASCADE with author_user_id SET NULL; spec-required indexes landed; SQLite + Postgres green.
Shipped with cd-pjm: +2 regression tests (digest period_end=period_start rejection, messaging package re-import idempotence). Quality gates green.

Shipped: email_opt_out + email_delivery tables + alembic migration d4e5f6a7b8c9. Both tenancy-scoped; portable CHECK constraints on source / delivery_state; unique index on (workspace_id, user_id, category); delivery.to_person_id stays a soft reference per spec §10 (client_user may not yet be in user); all spec-required indexes landed; SQLite + Postgres green; 107/107 tests.

Shipped with cd-aqwt: harmonised ULID column type to plain String (matching cd-pjm + the rest of the codebase); all CHECKs, indexes, cascade semantics verified; schema parity + reimport idempotence preserved.

Shipped: SSE transport at /w/<slug>/events. In-process fan-out built on app.events.bus; role + kind allowlist via ClassVar on Event; user-scoped events filtered by actor_user_id; 15 s heartbeat; 60 s Last-Event-ID replay with per-process stream token so a restart forces a full replay; 256-slot bounded queue with event:dropped frame on backpressure; TanStack Query invalidation map per §14. /admin/events twin explicitly deferred to cd-yj4k per director brief.

Shipped with cd-clz9: stream-token id fix (BUG — post-restart replay), permissive allowed_roles review gate (RISKY), Last-Event-ID parse hardening, cross-thread publisher coverage, generator-cancellation cleanup, TODO for invalidation data file. 72/72 tests green.

Shipped: web SSE client at app/web/src/lib/sse.ts with full INVALIDATIONS map per spec §14 §'Event kinds', jittered exponential backoff capped at 30 s, workspace-switch teardown, unknown-kind warn-don't-throw, provider wired to authenticated routes only, Last-Event-ID preserved via native EventSource behaviour. 43 new lib tests + 11 updated provider tests green.

Shipped with cd-y4g5: documented the intentional alias pairs on EventKind (approval.decided/resolved, expense.decided vs {approved,rejected,reimbursed}); removed zombie SseEvent union in types/sse.ts (kept AgentTurnScope; added pointer to @/lib/sse). 186/186 web vitest; tsc clean.

Shipped: ModelAssignment, AgentToken, ApprovalRequest, LlmUsage, BudgetLedger tables + alembic migration e5f6a7b8c9d0. All tenancy-scoped; portable CHECK on approval_request.status ({pending,approved,rejected,timed_out}) and llm_usage.status ({ok,error,refused,timeout}); unique index per workspace on (capability), (period_start, period_end); prefix composite index for token listing; FK rules per spec (workspace CASCADE, user SET NULL to preserve audit trail, model_id soft reference awaiting llm_model registry).

Shipped with cd-cm5: AgentToken.hash now has unique constraint (aligns with ApiToken.hash sibling); +4 regression tests (hash uniqueness schema + integrity, overlapping-but-not-identical budget period, duplicate hash rejection). 82/82 green SQLite + Postgres.

Selfreview was performed inline as part of cd-o62m (commit b10c94f) per director skill workflow — autofixed flake-handling for per-IP rate limit, added skip semantics; all gates green. No additional changes needed.

Resolved: §11 §'Model assignment' schema block now matches cd-u84y's workspace-scoped ModelAssignment (ULID PK, workspace_id FK CASCADE, UNIQUE(workspace_id, capability, priority)). Added paragraph describing deployment-seed + workspace-override layered resolve, mirroring the cd-tw7k fix on llm_capability_inheritance.

Selfreview was performed inline as part of cd-wchi (commit 0a06089) per director skill workflow — autofixed 3 mypy --strict errors on workspace_id widening (added narrowing assertions in _to_ref + new _row_to_ref helper). All gates green: 357 SQLite tests, 58 PG tests, mypy --strict clean, alembic round-trip clean.

Selfreview was performed inline as part of cd-kgcc (commit d9d214e) per director skill workflow — no fixes warranted, all gates green: 49/49 tests on SQLite + 15/15 on Postgres, mypy --strict clean, alembic round-trip clean on both backends.
Selfreview was performed inline as part of cd-xgmu (commit pending). All gates green: 57 tests pass, mypy --strict clean, ruff clean. No fixes warranted.
Selfreview was performed inline as part of cd-yj4k. All gates green: 60 tests pass, mypy --strict clean, ruff clean. One minor test polish applied (sorted-keys regression guard).

wontfix: server-side virus scanning is out of proportion to crew.day's threat model (small self-hosted app for vacation-rental managers + cleaners). MIME sniff (cd-ba5c) is the genuine control. User feedback: 'totally overblown and useless'.

Split into 4 atomic subset tasks: cd-lot5 (me_schedule), cd-r5j2 (user_availability_overrides), cd-2upg (user_leaves), cd-24im (email_change). cd-jlp1 self-review can be redirected as the parent rolls up.
Parent cd-mmbt was split — selfreviews live with each subset (cd-lot5, cd-r5j2, cd-2upg, cd-24im have their own pairs).

Duplicate of cd-9xo8 (same time.update CLI verb collision filed earlier today).
